content:
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[CssPipeline::process entry_path] --> B[lightningcss::parse source]
    B --> C[resolve_imports: inline all @import]
    C --> D{Has @tailwind directives?}

    D -->|Yes| E[ContentScanner::scan glob_patterns]
    E --> F[Extract used class names]
    F --> G[TailwindEmitter::generate layers]
    G --> H[Inject base/components/utilities at @tailwind positions]
    D -->|No| I
    H --> I[expand_at_apply: resolve @apply to CSS rules]

    I --> J{Has @apply?}
    J -->|Yes| K[Lookup utility rules for each class in @apply]
    K --> L[Replace @apply with property declarations]
    J -->|No| M
    L --> M[route_at_layer: insert @layer custom rules]

    M --> N[lightningcss::transform]
    N --> O[Apply: nesting, custom media, vendor prefixes]
    O --> P{Production mode?}

    P -->|Yes| Q[lightningcss::minify]
    P -->|No| R[Return expanded CSS]
    Q --> R

    R --> S[CssOutput: css + source_map + hash]
```
